Title: Add new mass unit value
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Core module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Core > Mass Units
2. Click Add New Value
3. Enter unit name
4. Save
Expected Result: New mass unit value added to the list

Title: Update mass unit value
Steps:
1. Open existing mass unit
2. Edit name
3. Save

Title: Delete mass unit value
Preconditions: Mass unit value exists (not in use)
Steps:
1. Select mass unit value
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Mass unit value deleted from list

Title: Mass units shown in product properties
Steps:
1. Navigate to product properties
2. Check mass unit dropdown
Expected Result: Configured mass units appear in product property dropdown

Title: Add new language
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Core > Languages
2. Click Add New Value
3. Select language
4. Save
Expected Result: New language added to platform languages list

Title: Update language value
Steps:
1. Open existing language
2. Modify settings
3. Save

Title: Languages shown in store settings
Steps:
1. Navigate to Store settings
2. Check languages dropdown
Expected Result: Configured languages appear in store language settings

Title: Core permissions - currency CRUD
Steps:
1. Test currency:create permission
2. Test currency:update permission
3. Test currency:delete permission
Expected Result: Each permission level grants/restricts appropriate currency operations

Title: Core permissions - package type CRUD
